jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at SEBI
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Investment Banker based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!
